ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of the property (e.g., Sale, Rent) */,
  "price" REAL /* Listing price of the property */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author responsible for the listing */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the property is situated */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the property is featured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., Available, Sold, Rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the agency the agent belongs to */,
  "agency_address" TEXT /* Address of the agency */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type (e.g., Sale, Rent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Sunway Velocity) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State for the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who purchased the property */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Sale, Rent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the buyer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who viewed the property */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for viewing (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who added the property to favorites */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that is favorited */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was added to favorites */,
  "favorited_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the property is still favorited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_favorites_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being reviewed */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the buyer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who set the alert */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., agent, buyer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Details about the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the account */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number associated with the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inquiries" (
  "inquiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inquiry */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property inquired about */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer who made the inquiry */,
  "inquiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the inquiry was made */,
  "inquiry_text" TEXT /* Text of the inquiry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inquiry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inquiries_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account receiving the notification */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text of the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("account_id")
)
